if.test: dateStart != null and dateStart != '' and dateEnd != null and dateEnd != '' and dateType != null and dateType != ''

choose.when: AND m.send_date >= #{dateStart}::DATE AND m.send_date < (#{dateEnd}::DATE + INTERVAL '1 day')
AND m.reg_date >= #{dateStart}::DATE AND m.reg_date < (#{dateEnd}::DATE + INTERVAL '1 day')
AND m.upd_date >= #{dateStart}::DATE AND m.upd_date < (#{dateEnd}::DATE + INTERVAL '1 day')

mapper.select: SELECT /* base.ec.cm :: CmChattMsg :: selectById */ m.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm FROM cm_chatt_msg m LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = m.site_id WHERE m.chatt_msg_id = #{id}

SELECT /* base.ec.cm :: CmChattMsg :: selectList */ m.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm FROM cm_chatt_msg m LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = m.site_id
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT /* base.ec.cm :: CmChattMsg :: selectPageList */ m.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm FROM cm_chatt_msg m LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = m.site_id
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(m.*) /* base.ec.cm :: CmChattMsg :: selectPageCount */ FROM cm_chatt_msg m
